dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal describes a two-candle reversal pattern: (1) rejection candle with long upper wick in uptrend, followed by (2) red candle breaking the rejection candle's low. Translated as: upper_wick > body (rejection with long tail), close < prev_close (red/bearish candle), and low < prev_low (breaks rejection low). Exit long trades when the low break occurs. Entry short requires all three conditions (AND logic). Upper wick approximates the rejection tail; actual 'rejection candle' concept requires visual confirmation but is captured through wick/body ratio and close action.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal describes a two-candle reversal pattern: (1) rejection candle with long upper wick in uptrend, followed by (2) red candle breaking the rejection candle's low. Translated as: upper_wick > body (rejection with long tail), close < prev_close (red/bearish candle), and low < prev_low (breaks rejection low). Exit long trades when the low break occurs. Entry short requires all three conditions (AND logic). Upper wick approximates the rejection tail; actual 'rejection candle' concept requires visual confirmation but is captured through wick/body ratio and close action.

source_rule_text: Exit long trades and consider going short when a rejection candle with a long upper tail in an uptrend is followed by a red candle that takes down the low of the rejection candle.
